name: codex-council
description: Local Codex Council workflows for role-based discussion, review, design, and optional file changes.

interface.shortDescription: Run role-based Codex subagent councils over a local MCP blackboard.
interface.longDescription: Codex Council coordinates role-based subagents for general discussion, review, design, decision support, research-style analysis, and explicitly authorized file changes. It stores durable local state in a SQLite-backed MCP blackboard and keeps long evidence in workspace artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Run a standard council discussion about this question.
Use a council to compare options and recommend a decision.
Review this document, plan, or code with a council.
